changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: UPDATE actions_config SET config = jsonb_set( config, '{payment_method,config,tiers,0,upperLimitHa}'::text[], '50'::jsonb ) WHERE code = 'PA3' AND is_active = TRUE;

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: UPDATE actions_config SET config = jsonb_set( config, '{duration_years}', '10') WHERE code = 'PA3' AND is_active = TRUE;
